title: Project Red Fabrication
description: A collection of mods that aim to vastly improved Redstone circuitry with wiring, logic gates, integrated circuits, and more. Heavily inspired by Red Power by Eloraam.
body:
Project Red is a collection of mods that aim to vastly improved Redstone circuitry with wiring, logic gates, integrated circuits, and more. Heavily inspired by **Red Power** by Eloraam.

This is the Fabrication module. It adds the ability to design, fabricate, and deploy huge and performant redstone circuits in compact, single-block gates.

### Dependencies
A few external library mods are required for Project Red to work:

* **[CodeChicken Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/codechicken-lib)**
* **[CB Multipart](https://modrinth.com/mod/cb-multipart)**


### Modules
Here is a list of Project Red modules, and a summary of what they add. You may pick and choose which ones you'd like to install.

* **[Core](https://modrinth.com/project/project-red-core):** A common library shared by the other modules. By itself it doesn't add much, but is *required* to be installed.
* **[Expansion](https://modrinth.com/project/project-red-expansion):** Machines, frames, motors, electricity generation.
* **[Exploration](https://modrinth.com/project/project-red-exploration):** Worldgen, ores, tools, decorative blocks, etc.
* **[Illumination](https://modrinth.com/project/project-red-illumination):** Decorative, redstone-controlled lighting
* **[Integration](https://modrinth.com/project/project-red-integration)**: Redstone logic gates that can replace very large multi-block circuits.
* **[Transmission](https://modrinth.com/project/project-red-transmission)**: Redstone wiring that can run up walls, connect around corners, and merge together into a bunled cable.
* **[Fabrication](https://modrinth.com/project/project-red-fabrication)**: Design and fabricate custom integrated circuits and place them as a single high-performance gate (*Note*: requires **Integration** and **Transmission**).


### Community
* [Github Discussions](https://github.com/MrTJP/ProjectRed/discussions) - For feature requests, questions or other development related discusstions
* [Chickenbones Mods Discord](https://discord.com/invite/9nr3qyC) - If you'd like to chat or send a DM

### Modpacks
You may use my mods in modpacks as you'd like. If you can provide a link to this page, that would be appreciated :)
